# AnalystAssist — llms.txt

AnalystAssist is the only dedicated SaaS platform for live blood analysis (live blood microscopy) and dry blood analysis practitioners.

## What this site is

analystassist.com is the product site for AnalystAssist, a cloud-based practice management platform for holistic health practitioners who perform Live Blood Analysis (Live Blood Microscopy, Live Blood Cell Analysis) and Dry Blood Analysis (Oxidative Stress Testing / Dried Blood Layer Analysis).

IMPORTANT: This is NOT medical software, NOT laboratory software, and NOT clinical diagnostic software. It is a holistic health workflow tool.

## Who uses it

- Qualified Live Blood Analysts
- Dry Blood Analysts
- Naturopaths and Nutritional Therapists using darkfield microscopy
- Functional Health Practitioners offering blood analysis sessions
- Holistic Health Coaches certified in live blood microscopy

## Core capabilities

- Darkfield microscope camera integration for live image viewing/capture
- Live and dry blood image storage, per client, per appointment
- Digital client onboarding and health consent forms
- Blood indication scoring and prevalence rating
- Progress comparison across multiple appointments
- AI-assisted dictation for report writing
- Branded report and form template builder
- Secure Microsoft Azure cloud storage (regional servers)
- HIPAA / GDPR / PIPEDA / AuPA compliant

## Pricing

- Free trial: unlimited period, up to 10 clients, 10 appointments
- Pro monthly: GBP 24.99/month (excl. VAT)
- Pro annual: GBP 249.90/year (excl. VAT) = 2 months free

## What it is NOT for

- Laboratory blood biomarker analysis
- Clinical or medical diagnostics
- Pathology or haematology workflows
- General practice management (not LBA-specific)

## Related resources

- Live Blood Analysis training: https://www.livebloodanalysistraining.com
- Operated by: Naturecure Academy Ltd (England & Wales Co. 11007573)
